failure_reason: Bound method-specific mutation preview routes in the production kernel-router manifest. POST/PATCH idea and POST/PATCH/DELETE spec routes now have X-Form-Native-Preview-gated native handlers that bind request bodies and path ids to application graph SQL previews over graph_nodes, graph_node_revisions, and graph_edges while ordinary no-header mutation requests still fan out to FastAPI. runtime_surface_report.py now counts method-specific kh-route/raw 43004 rows, raising kernel-first capable API bindings to 33.
